name: Scania (Skåne, Sweden)
description: A red field with a yellow Nordic cross.
history: Unofficial flag of the Swedish historical province (landskap) of Scania, designed in 1902 by Martin Weibull combining the Danish red with a Swedish-style cross. Scania was Danish until ceded to Sweden in 1658. The flag has gained widespread popular use as the symbol of Scanian regional identity.

features.symbolism: the red field of the Danish flag combined with a yellow cross in the Swedish style — reflecting Scania's history as a Danish province until 1658
